race.comment: Of the runners with race experience UNJUST (11) clearly has the best credentials. Closed last prep on 14 February with a respectable second, beaten a length, over 1200m at this track. Has placed when fresh in the past. Thrown in with 52kgs and looks a great chance to finally break the ice. Speedy three-year-old MR CORNSTAR (6) registered his first placings last start, leading for much of the way before finding one better over 1000m at Quirindi. Coming back to 900m with blinkers on looks a nice set up. ZOUBOY (2) is a Zousain gelding on debut for local trainer Nathan Doyle. Wasn't far away in his latest trial. Draws a good gate so should be given every possible chance. Debutante COSMIC ORDER (4) has been to the trials five times since October. Has showed glimpses of talent so keep her in mind. REIGN SUPREME (1) is another first starter worth monitoring for market support.
